title: PJTAU Teaching Associate Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
shortInfo: Professor Jayashankar Telangana Agricultural University (PJTAU) has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of 3 Teaching Associate Posts. This walk-in drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Candidates with M.Sc (Ag) or Ph.D in Agronomy, M.Sc (Ag) or Ph.D in Soil Science, M.Sc (Ag) or Ph.D in Genetics and Plant Breeding / Seed Technology qualification can directly attend the interview on 29-05-2026.

basic_details.short_information: Professor Jayashankar Telangana Agricultural University (PJTAU) has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of 3 Teaching Associate Posts. This walk-in drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Candidates with M.Sc (Ag) or Ph.D in Agronomy, M.Sc (Ag) or Ph.D in Soil Science, M.Sc (Ag) or Ph.D in Genetics and Plant Breeding / Seed Technology qualification can directly attend the interview on 29-05-2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc (Ag) or Ph.D in Agronomy, M.Sc (Ag) or Ph.D in Soil Science, M.Sc (Ag) or Ph.D in Genetics and Plant Breeding / Seed Technology
qualification.details: Teaching Associate (Agronomy): M.Sc (Ag) or Ph.D in Agronomy Teaching Associate (Soil Science and Agricultural Chemistry): M.Sc (Ag) or Ph.D in Soil Science Teaching Associate (Genetics and Plant Breeding): M.Sc (Ag) or Ph.D in Genetics and Plant Breeding / Seed Technology

vacancy_details.Post Name: Teaching Associate (Soil Science and Agricultural Chemistry)

salary_details.details: For Ph.D holders: Rs. 54,000/- Per Month For M.Sc (Ag) holders: Rs. 49,000/- Per Month

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for PJTAU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Teaching Associate posts at Professor Jayashankar Telangana Agricultural University is scheduled for 29th May 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Teaching Associate posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc (Ag) or Ph.D in Agronomy, Soil Science, or Genetics and Plant Breeding / Seed Technology to be eligible for these positions.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for the PJTAU Teaching Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Teaching Associate positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 54,000/- per month for Ph.D holders and Rs. 49,000/- per month for M.Sc (Ag) holders.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for Teaching Associates at PJTAU?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for Teaching Associate posts, with one vacancy each in Agronomy, Soil Science, and Genetics and Plant Breeding disciplines.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the PJTAU Teaching Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Walk-in Interview followed by a Demo Class for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the walk-in interview venue for PJTAU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Professor Jayashankar Telangana Agricultural University, Hyderabad, Telangana - 500030. Please refer to the official notification for the exact address.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Teaching Associate positions are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from outside Telangana apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification does not specify any domicile restrictions. However, candidates should check the official notification for any specific eligibility criteria regarding residency.
